allow:
Bash(1 <<'SQL'
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_current_tier_status\(\)
RETURNS TABLE \(
  tier_id INTEGER,
  tier_name TEXT,
  display_name TEXT,
  price_cents INTEGER,
  total_keys INTEGER,
  claimed_keys BIGINT,
  available_keys BIGINT,
  is_current BOOLEAN
\)
LANGUAGE plpgsql
SECURITY DEFINER
AS $
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  WITH tier_counts AS \(
    SELECT
      pt.id AS t_id,
      pt.name AS t_name,
      pt.display_name AS t_display_name,
      pt.price_cents AS t_price_cents,
      COALESCE\(pt.key_range_end - pt.key_range_start + 1, 99999\) AS t_total,
      COUNT\(l.id\) FILTER \(WHERE l.purchased_at IS NOT NULL\) AS t_claimed,
      pt.sort_order AS t_sort
    FROM public.pricing_tiers pt
    LEFT JOIN public.licenses l ON l.tier_id = pt.id
    WHERE pt.is_active = true
    GROUP BY pt.id
  \),
  current_tier AS \(
    SELECT MIN\(t_id\) AS current_id
    FROM tier_counts
    WHERE t_claimed < t_total
  \)
  SELECT
    tc.t_id,
    tc.t_name,
    tc.t_display_name,
    tc.t_price_cents,
    tc.t_total::INTEGER,
    tc.t_claimed,
    \(tc.t_total - tc.t_claimed\)::BIGINT,
    \(tc.t_id = ct.current_id\)
  FROM tier_counts tc
  CROSS JOIN current_tier ct
  ORDER BY tc.t_sort;
END;
$;
SQL)

const sql = `
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_current_tier_status\(\)
RETURNS TABLE \(
  tier_id INTEGER,
  tier_name TEXT,
  display_name TEXT,
  price_cents INTEGER,
  total_keys INTEGER,
  claimed_keys BIGINT,
  available_keys BIGINT,
  is_current BOOLEAN
\)
LANGUAGE plpgsql
SECURITY DEFINER
AS \\$\\$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  WITH tier_counts AS \(
    SELECT
      pt.id AS t_id,
      pt.name AS t_name,
      pt.display_name AS t_display_name,
      pt.price_cents AS t_price_cents,
      COALESCE\(pt.key_range_end - pt.key_range_start + 1, 99999\) AS t_total,
      COUNT\(l.id\) FILTER \(WHERE l.purchased_at IS NOT NULL\) AS t_claimed,
      pt.sort_order AS t_sort
    FROM public.pricing_tiers pt
    LEFT JOIN public.licenses l ON l.tier_id = pt.id
    WHERE pt.is_active = true
    GROUP BY pt.id
  \),
  current_tier AS \(
    SELECT MIN\(t_id\) AS current_id
    FROM tier_counts
    WHERE t_claimed < t_total
  \)
  SELECT
    tc.t_id,
    tc.t_name,
    tc.t_display_name,
    tc.t_price_cents,
    tc.t_total::INTEGER,
    tc.t_claimed,
    \(tc.t_total - tc.t_claimed\)::BIGINT,
    \(tc.t_id = ct.current_id\)
  FROM tier_counts tc
  CROSS JOIN current_tier ct
  ORDER BY tc.t_sort;
END;
\\$\\$;
`;

const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc\("""", {}\).then\(\(\) => \({ data: null, error: null }\)\).catch\(\(\) => \({ data: null, error: ""rpc failed"" }\)\);
